title: Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information

references.description: Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information
Security of processing when error messages leak personal data.
references.condition: The affected system processes personal data as defined by GDPR Art. 4

references.description: ICT security requiring that error handling does not expose sensitive operational data.
references.condition: The affected system is part of the ICT infrastructure of a financial entity subject to DORA

references.description: Application security requirements covering safe error handling.
